ops.title: Fix stale inline-test expectations in cc-notes capt-hook pack (5 failures)
ops.description: `uvx capt-hook test` against the cc-notes pack at 383f7f0 (latest; pack update is a no-op) fails 5 inline tests: three in `nudge_record_evidence`, one in `nudge_ephemeral_record_reference`, one in `nudge_plan_tasks`. Cause: the hook warn messages were rewritten to MCP-tool phrasing ("call the log_add tool… the attach param", "the task_add tool with acceptance criteria") but the inline test expectations still regex-match the old CLI phrasing (`--attach`, `cc-notes log add`, `cc-notes task add`). Fix in the cc-notes repo (/Users/yasyf/Code/cc-notes): update the test expectations to match the current messages (or vice versa), prove with `uvx capt-hook test`, release. Found 2026-07-12 while running pre-ship hook tests in getaway (unrelated to the getaway change; getaway's own `--hooks hooks` pack passes 0-fail).

ops.text: uvx capt-hook test against the cc-notes pack passes with 0 failures at the new commit
getaway's .claude/hooks pack pin picks up the fixed commit via capt-hook pack update
